transcript: Speaker A: ಸಿಮ್ರಾನ್ meeting ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಯಾಕೆ ಮಾತಾಡಲಿಲ್ಲ? [Simran, why didn't you speak in the meeting?] Speaker B: Sir, I try. But English words not coming. Speaker A: ಸಿಮ್ರಾನ್, ನಿನ್ನ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಇಂಪ್ರೂವ್ ಆಗ್ಲಿಲ್ಲ ಅಂದ್ರೆ ಈ ಜಾಬ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ತುಂಬಾ ದಿನ ಇರಕ್ಕೆ ಆಗಲ್ಲ. [Simran, if your English doesn't improve, you can't stay in this job for long.] Speaker B: ಅಣ್ಣ, ಎಷ್ಟು ಇದಕ್ಕೆ? [Brother, how much for this?] Speaker C: So ma'am, your bill is around five thousand. Would you like to pay it by cash, UPI or card, whichever is convenient for you? Speaker B: ನೀವು ಇಷ್ಟು ಚಿಕ್ಕ shop ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಕೆಲಸ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ರು, ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಅಷ್ಟು ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತೀರಾ? [Even though you work in such a small shop, how do you speak English so well?] Speaker C: Ma'am, ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯೋದು ತುಂಬಾ easy. Simple ಆಗಿ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕಂದ್ರೆ ನಿಮ್ಮ phone ಇದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು. [Ma'am, learning English is very easy. Simply put, your phone is enough.] Speaker B: Phone ಅಲ್ಲಿನಾ? ಅದು ಹೇಗೆ work ಆಗುತ್ತೆ ಅಂತ ನನಗೆ ಗೊತ್ತಿಲ್ಲ. [On the phone? I don't know how that works.] Speaker C: ನೋಡಿ, ನನ್ನ phone ಅಲ್ಲಿ SpeakX app ಇದೆ. ಇದರಲ್ಲಿ ಒಂದು AI teacher ಇರ್ತಾರೆ. ನಿಮಗೆ ಯಾವಾಗ ಬೇಕಾದ್ರೂ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. Office friends ಜೊತೆ ಮಾತಾಡೋದು ಆಗ್ಲಿ, manager ಜೊತೆ communication ಆಗ್ಲಿ ಅಥವಾ restaurant ಅಲ್ಲಿ order ಮಾಡೋದು ಆಗ್ಲಿ ಎಲ್ಲಾ ಕಲಿಸ್ತಾರೆ. Daily life ಅಲ್ಲಿ ನಡೆಯೋ real situations ನ ಯೂಸ್ ಮಾಡಿ basics ಇಂದ ಕಲಿಸ್ತಾರೆ. Daily 15 to 20 minutes AI teacher ಜೊತೆ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು. ನನ್ನನ್ನೇ ನೋಡಿ, ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿತ ಮೇಲೆ ನನ್ನ salary ನೂ increase ಆಯ್ತು. ಈಗ ನನಗೆ ಜನರು ಕೊಡುವ respect ಕೂಡ ಜಾಸ್ತಿ ಆಗಿದೆ. ಹಾಗಾಗಿ ಇನ್ನು ಭಯ ಪಡಬೇಡಿ. SpeakX ಇಂದ ನೀವು 15 ದಿನದಲ್ಲಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ confident ಆಗಿ ಮಾತಾಡಬಹುದು. [Look, I have the SpeakX app on my phone. There is an AI teacher in it. You can practice English whenever you want. Whether it's talking to office friends, communicating with the manager, or ordering in a restaurant, they teach everything. They teach from basics using real situations that happen in daily life. Just practicing with the AI teacher for 15 to 20 minutes daily is enough. Look at me, after learning English, my salary also increased. Now the respect people give me has also increased. So don't be afraid anymore. With SpeakX, you can speak English confidently in 15 days.] Speaker B: ಹೌದಾ? ನಾನು ಇವಾಗ್ಲೇ SpeakX app download ಮಾಡ್ತೀನಿ. [Really? I will download the SpeakX app right now.]
on_screen_text:
SpeakX Powered by AI
Hi
Hello there! To start, which of these sounds most like the English speaking challenge you're facing right now: mind going blank, trouble with sentence structure, or pronunciation issues?
ನಾನು ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತಾಡಬೇಕು [I want to speak in English]
Hi ->
SpeakX Powered by AI
summary: A woman is warned by her boss that she might lose her job due to poor English skills. While shopping, she meets a fluent shopkeeper who attributes his English proficiency and career growth to the SpeakX app. Inspired by his success, she decides to download the app to practice daily with its AI teacher.
